Interface ITinNode2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN nodes.

[Guid("3D212052-AD4B-11D5-ABB8-0008C73FD50C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITinNode2 : ITinNode, ITinElement
